hero.subtitle:
I build and run AI outbound systems for staffing agencies that fill your client pipeline with hiring managers and HR leaders, on autopilot, in your existing tools.
By Vitor Pepicon, Top 1% on Upwork, 100+ projects.

trustedBy._suffixBackup: ...and other lean teams that automated before they hired.

services.title: What I build and run for you
services.subtitle: Every system is custom built around your client acquisition process.

features.label: AI Powered Prospect Scoring
features.description: AI scores every prospect using your CRM data, engagement signals, and company details. Your team stops guessing and calls the hiring managers most likely to convert.
features.benchmark: Companies using AI scoring see up to 25% higher conversion rates and cut wasted calls on unqualified prospects by half.

features.label: Personalized Client Outreach on Autopilot
features.description: AI powered sequences that write relevant, role specific messages to hiring managers and HR leaders. Every message references something specific about their company, not a template.
features.benchmark: AI personalized outreach gets 2x higher reply rates compared to static email sequences. Most clients see 5 to 15 interested replies per month.

features.label: Prospect Research on Autopilot
features.description: As companies enter your pipeline, missing data gets filled in automatically: company size, hiring volume, industry, decision maker contacts. No more manual LinkedIn stalking.
features.benchmark: Automating prospect research saves your team 10 to 15 hours per week and ensures every outreach goes to a verified, complete contact.

features.label: Email Infrastructure and Inbox Placement
features.description: I set up dedicated sending domains, configure authentication, warm up mailboxes, and monitor sender reputation. Your main domain is never touched.
features.benchmark: Proper infrastructure is the difference between 95%+ inbox placement and landing in spam. Without it, nothing else matters.

pricing.intro: I build the system. Then I run it for you.

plans.name: Outreach Audit
plans.description: I review your outreach process, tools, and setup, and reply with 2-3 high impact automation ideas within 48 hours.
features: Personalized review of your CRM and outreach process
Actionable recommendations you can use immediately

plans.name: Full Service
plans.description: I build your AI outbound system, then run it for you. Every engagement is scoped to what you actually need. Not everything below will apply, and that's fine. You take the client meetings. I handle everything upstream.

features.heading: Month 1 - Setup
items: AI prospect scoring built into your CRM
AI powered outreach sequences (email + optional LinkedIn)
Automated follow-ups, prospect routing, deal updates
Prospecting system configured with your ideal client criteria

features.heading: Month 2+ - Ongoing
items: Monthly prospect list refreshes with new target companies
Campaign monitoring: inbox placement, opens, and replies
Monthly performance report with video walkthrough
Additional campaigns or verticals scoped as add-ons
Fast support via email or Slack

plans.bottomLine: What you get: a done for you client acquisition engine that fills your pipeline month after month, without hiring a sales rep.

items.question: Can you integrate with my current CRM and tools?
items.answer: Yes. HubSpot, Bullhorn, Pipedrive, Zoho, and anything with an API or Zapier/Make integration. I also set up email infrastructure from scratch if you need outbound built from zero.

items.question: Do I need technical expertise to work with you?
items.answer: Zero. You focus on selling, I'll handle the nerdy stuff behind the curtain.

items.question: How quickly can I expect results?
items.answer: Weeks 1 and 2: I build everything. Week 3: first outreach goes live. Week 4 onward: replies start coming in. Most clients see a steady flow of interested prospects by the end of month 2.

items.question: What if I'm not even sure what I need?
items.answer: No problem: bring your chaos to the email exchange and I'll bring the clarity.

items.question: Is this just another AI tool?
items.answer: No. I don't sell software. I build custom automation into your existing tools and run your entire client outreach for you on an ongoing basis. Hands on consulting plus done for you execution.

items.question: What's the minimum commitment?
items.answer: 3 months. Month 1 is setup. Months 2-3 are when results start compounding. After that, continue month to month as long as it's working for you.

items.question: What happens in month 1?
items.answer: I build everything: email infrastructure, prospect scoring, outreach sequences, and your first campaign goes live. By the end of month 1, hiring managers are already hitting your inbox.

items.question: How many interested prospects should I expect?
items.answer: It depends on your market and offer, but most campaigns generate 5 to 15 interested replies per month once everything is running. Some clients see results as early as week 3.

items.question: What metrics do I see?
items.answer: Every month you get a report showing prospects contacted, emails sent, open rate, reply rate, and interested prospects forwarded to you. Full transparency, no vanity metrics.

items.question: Will this hurt my email domain or reputation?
items.answer: No. I set up separate sending domains that redirect to yours. Your main domain is never used for outbound. If anything goes wrong with a sending domain, your primary email and website are completely unaffected.

items.question: Will my prospect lists be shared with other clients?
items.answer: No. Your data stays yours. I never share prospect lists, campaign copy, or outreach strategies between clients.

content: I help staffing agencies get more clients without hiring more reps. I build AI powered outbound systems that put hiring managers on your calendar, and I run the whole thing for you.
No new platforms. No new hires. Just more clients.
Send me your setup and I'll reply with a free outreach audit within 48 hours.
Vitor Pepicon, Top 1% on Upwork, 100+ projects delivered.

footer.tagline: AI powered client acquisition for staffing agencies.
